title: Un marido a precio fijo

actors: Lina Yegros, Rafael Durán, Luis Villasiul
plot: Estrella, a millionaire's daughter, acts impulsively leaving her boring suitor for traveling abroad and marrying a man she has just met. After she has cabled everybody he runs away with her jewels leaving her in evidence. On her w...
